record_types.name: Mount_Orientation

fields.name: Roll
fields.description:
Units: [deg]
Roll in global frame (set to NaN for invalid).

fields.name: Pitch
fields.description:
Units: [deg]
Pitch in global frame (set to NaN for invalid).

fields.name: Yaw
fields.description:
Units: [deg]
Yaw relative to vehicle (set to NaN for invalid).

fields.name: Yaw_Absolute
fields.description:
Units: [deg]
Yaw in absolute frame relative to Earth's North, north is 0 (set to
NaN for invalid).
